findings.title: Hardcoded secret/token
findings.description: A secret or credential was found in source code. Secrets must never be committed to repositories.
findings.fix: Move this secret to a secure vault (Vault, AWS KMS, etc.) or environment variable. Never commit secrets to source control.

findings.title: No session timeout configuration detected
findings.description: No session expiration or timeout configuration found. Sessions must expire after a period of inactivity.
findings.fix: Configure session expiration: maxAge, idle timeout, or JWT expiration.

findings.title: Missing audit timestamps in schema
findings.description: Database schema does not include created_at/updated_at timestamps. These are mandatory for audit trails.
findings.fix: Add created_at and updated_at columns. In Prisma: add DateTime fields, in Sequelize: timestamps: true, in Django: auto_now_add=True.

findings.title: Missing soft delete pattern
findings.description: No deleted_at column or soft delete pattern found. Hard deletes prevent audit trail and data recovery.
findings.fix: Add deleted_at column or soft delete flag. In Prisma: DeletedAt DateTime?, in Sequelize: paranoid: true, in Django: SoftDeleteModel.

findings.title: Missing user audit columns
findings.description: No created_by/updated_by columns found. Track who makes changes for accountability.
findings.fix: Add created_by and updated_by columns to track which user made changes.
